chapter_title.en: Chapter on a Woman Performing Hajj Without a Mahram or Guardian

text: 2911 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ هِشَامٍ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ خَالِدٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي اَلْمَرْأَةِ تُرِيدُ اَلْحَجَّ وَ لَيْسَ مَعَهَا مَحْرَمٌ هَلْ يَصْلُحُ لَهَا اَلْحَجُّ فَقَالَ «نَعَمْ إِذَا كَانَتْ مَأْمُونَةً ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2911 - In a narration from Hisham, from Sulayman ibn Khalid, from Abu Abdullah (as), regarding a woman who wants to perform Hajj but does not have a mahram (close male relative), he (as) was asked: "Is it permissible for her to perform Hajj?"
Imam (as) said: "Yes, if she is trustworthy."
